title: Man from Frisco
writer: Ethel Hill, Arnold Manoff, George Worthing Yates
actors: Michael O'Shea, Anne Shirley, Gene Lockhart
plot: Matt Braddock (a fictional version of real-life Henry Kaiser) is an engineer with revolutionary ideas for shipbuilding. When he tries to set up yards for prefabricating ships on the West Coast, he runs up against a rival builder, ...
